text.title: Elicitation Techniques Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: Halt; do not author the artefact.

branch.question: What is the dominant information type?

conclusion.verdict: Use 1:1 interview format with structured guide.
Use facilitated workshop with consensus-building activities.
Use survey instrument with statistical sampling.
